name: smart_classroom_audio_summary
description: Transcribe classroom audio and generate a Markdown summary using Smart Classroom. Invokes the existing Pipeline directly (no FastAPI server required).

audio_file.description: Path to an audio file accessible to Smart Classroom (e.g. /data/lecture.wav).

audio_filename.description: Filename of audio already staged under the project storage directory (e.g. uploaded via /upload-audio).

session_id.description: Optional existing Smart Classroom session id. A new one is created when omitted.

source_type.description: Audio source type. Only 'audio_file' is supported by the skill adapter.

include_transcript.description: When true, the full transcript text is included in the output.

session_id.description: The Smart Classroom session id used for this run.

summary_markdown.description: Full generated classroom summary in Markdown format.

transcription_events.description: Raw chunk-level transcription events emitted by the pipeline.

error_codes.AudioSummaryInputError: Invalid or missing input (e.g. no audio provided, file not found, unsupported source_type).
error_codes.RuntimeError: Pipeline initialisation, transcription, or summarisation failure.

environment_notes: ASR and LLM models must be available as configured in config.yaml.
ffmpeg must be installed and on PATH.
Set PYTHONPATH to include the smart-classroom root directory.
GPU or CPU device configuration is controlled by config.yaml.
